safe_description: Customer dimension table with aggregated order history. Contains PII fields (name age) that are masked in AI output. Use for aggregate analytics only.
Order fact table. Aggregate-only: AI may report on counts sums and averages but may NOT return individual order records. Financial data.
Payment transaction records. Restricted access. Aggregate queries only. Do not expose payment method details or individual amounts.
Customer membership and subscription status. Safe for AI use. Can be used for filtering grouping and reporting.
Web and app event stream. Contains session and page-view data. PII fields (ip_address user_agent) are excluded from AI context. Aggregate use only.
Raw user identity table. Hard deny for all AI use. Access controlled by the identity-team only.
Product/subscription plan catalog. Fully AI-approved. Safe for RAG Text2SQL summarization and explanation.
Staged customer records from Chinook music store. Contains direct PII. AI may use this for aggregate customer analytics only.
Employee records. Contains PII and salary data. Severely restricted. Available only for org-chart count queries in the hr workspace.
Invoice/revenue data for the Chinook music store. Certified for aggregate financial analytics. Do not expose individual invoice amounts.
Music track catalog. Fully AI-approved for all use cases. No PII or sensitive data. Safe for RAG Text2SQL and summarization.
Music artist reference data. Fully AI-approved.
